subcodes.title: Words to Ali Kuli Khan and Florence Khan, spoken on 1906-06-13
subcodes.first_line: Intuition (or inner perception) is a power or a light by which man comprehends and perceives the realities of things without the mediumship of the outward senses.
subcodes.subjects: @intuition; inspiration, @limits of the intellect, @four methods of acquiring knowledge, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @special knowledge of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
